response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed. The first segment from 00:00 to 01:13 is dialogue between two VTubers. At 01:13, the song "完全少女論" starts, and on-screen text identifies "北澤伸一郎" as the composer/lyricist. A search query `"完全少女論" 北澤伸一郎 Japanese and English lyrics` was used to find the song title and credits. The song is performed until 04:56, when the video ends. Lyrics were sourced from the Releska translation.
response.global_summary: The video begins with a dialogue scene featuring VTubers Shishiro Botan and AZKi, followed by a live musical performance of the song "完全少女論" by both of them.

scenes.description: Dialogue between Shishiro Botan and AZKi.
Live performance of "完全少女論" by Shishiro Botan and AZKi. Song title and credits displayed on-screen.
